triage_rationale: Interaction race detection via happens-before analysis for MARL is novel. Depth/rigor gaps in symbolic interfaces, probabilistic foundations, and Lipschitz/calibration analysis.

key_improvements.title: Formalize Symbolic Reasoning Interfaces
key_improvements.description: Specify the spec language grammar (BNF), formalize the contract DSL with composition soundness proof, add SMT-based contract discharge via Z3/LP, and design machine-checkable proof certificates with independent verification.
addresses_critiques: Lila Zhang: spec language grammar, contract DSL, SMT integration unspecified
Joseph S. Chang: proof certificates never specified in format/content
Aniruddha Sinha: certificate format and independent verifiability never described
deliverables: spec/grammar.py: Formal BNF grammar with documented production rules
decomposition/contracts.py: Formal composition soundness proof implementation
reporting/proof_certificates.py: Machine-checkable certificate format with inductive witnesses, fixpoint content, HB-consistency derivation, and independent checker

key_improvements.title: Rigorous Probabilistic Estimation Framework
key_improvements.description: Define the deployment schedule distribution explicitly (uniform over HB-consistent linearizations with formal measure), specify the cross-entropy parametric family with justification, implement finite-sample concentration bounds (Hoeffding for self-normalized IS, empirical Bernstein), and add convergence diagnostics with stopping criteria.
addresses_critiques: Yuan Cheng: deployment schedule distribution never formally defined
Yuan Cheng: cross-entropy proposal family unspecified
Yuan Cheng: confidence interval construction absent
deliverables: sampling/distribution.py: Formal deployment distribution with measure-theoretic definition
sampling/cross_entropy.py: Justified parametric family (Plackett-Luce + Gaussian timing)
sampling/convergence_theory.py: CE convergence proof with rate bounds

key_improvements.title: Lipschitz Tightness and Calibration Convergence
key_improvements.description: Implement LipSDP-style tighter Lipschitz bounds, prove epsilon-calibration convergence via Banach fixed-point, analyze cascading false-positive rates, and formally characterize interaction group size conditions for scalability.
addresses_critiques: Sara Roy: Lipschitz bound exponentially loose, cascading false-positive unanalyzed
Sara Roy: no LipSDP or optimization-based tighter bounds
Joseph S. Chang: epsilon-calibration convergence relies on unstated contractivity
deliverables: policy/lipschitz.py: Tightness analysis with lower bounds
race/calibration_convergence.py: Banach fixed-point proof for epsilon iteration
decomposition/group_size_theory.py: Formal conditions for bounded interaction groups

phases.B1: Execute all three improvements with real code and experiments
phases.B2: Mathematical rigor pass: verify all proofs, check theorem statements
phases.finalization: Rewrite tex, grounding.json, README, API.md, run experiments, commit
